title: Update Login Section UI

requirements.text: Redesign the login/authentication section of the app with an improved visual layout. Update the Internet Identity login UI to feature a more prominent, visually appealing login button with clear school branding (maroon and gold theme). Add a welcoming title, a brief description of the app, and the school logo/name above the login button. Ensure the login area is centered and styled consistently with the overall Suraj Navodaya App theme.
acceptanceCriteria: The login section displays the school name 'Suraj Navodaya' prominently above the login button
The Internet Identity login button is styled with the maroon and gold color theme
A welcoming description or tagline is visible near the login area
The login section is centered and visually consistent with the app's existing maroon/gold design system
Login functionality (Internet Identity) continues to work correctly after the UI changes

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts
Internet Identity authentication flow must remain fully functional
Maintain the existing maroon and gold color theme defined in tailwind.config.js and index.css
nonGoals: Adding new authentication providers (only Internet Identity is supported)
